creator: perlhack@protonmail.com
text:
The system on which I had this issue had perl5.28 with p5-HTML-Parser-3.72 installed (HTML::TokeParser was at version 3.69). I'm not sure why HTML::TokeParser wasn't found in my path, as it existed at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.28/HTML/TokeParser.pm and had the correct permissions.

I recently reinstalled perl (pkg install -f perl5, which upgraded to perl 5.30), and I also reinstalled p5-HTML-Parser, and the problem is now resolved.
